name: Mexican Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together the oil, chili powder, oregano, and cumin until well blended.
3. Pulse the tortilla chips in a food processor until finely ground. Pour into a shallow dish.
4. Dip each chicken piece in the seasoned oil, then dredge in the ground chips to coat evenly.
5. Place the coated chicken on a foil-lined baking sheet.
6. Bake for 45 minutes, or until the chicken is browned and crisp on the outside and tender inside. Serve hot.
